web.title: Output Speech/Audio from the Bot - Getting Started with Recall.ai
web.description: Make a bot speak or play audio into the meeting. Recall bots can speak back into the meeting in two different ways, depending on your use case:.

web.title: Send AI Agents to Meetings - Getting Started with Recall.ai
web.description: Stopping Output Media via the API ... You can stop the bot's media output at any point while the bot is streaming media by calling the Stop Output Media endpoint.

web.title: Delete Bot Media - Getting Started with Recall.ai
web.description: Deletes bot media stored by Recall. This is irreversible. The base rate limit for this endpoint is: 300 requests per min per workspace.

web.title: Output Audio - Getting Started with Recall.ai
web.description: Causes the bot to output audio. Note: The bot must be configured with 'automatic_audio_output' enabled in order to use this endpoint.

web.title: Recall.ai Output Media API: send AI agents to your meetings
web.description: Learn how to use Recall.ai's Output Media API to send interactive AI agents into live meetings. This demo shows how a bot can speak, listen, ...
